release.notes: Red sample sticker on obi. White labels with sample promo symbols.

videos.title: Ultravox - Vienna (Full Album, 1980)
videos.description: Vienna is the fourth studio album by the synthpop band Ultravox, first released on 11 July 1980. The album peaked at #3 in the UK charts and was the first Ultravox release to enter the UK top ten. It was certified Platinum in the United Kingdom in July 19
